data.description:
## Incident Overview

**Scenario Type**: CI test failure
**Source**: PR #16 Script Tests job

### Expected Behavior
ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh should derive parent repo path using git commands or other portable methods (not `../`).

### Actual Behavior
Line 48 uses: _PLUGIN_PARENT_REPO="$(cd "$_PLUGIN_ROOT/../.." && pwd)"
This uses a relative path pattern (`../`) which violates the no-relative-paths rule.

### Error
Violations found:
plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh:48:_PLUGIN_PARENT_REPO="$(cd "$_PLUGIN_ROOT/../.." && pwd)"
FAIL: test_no_relative_paths_in_plugin_scripts
data.title: [ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh]: relative path `../` used for PLUGIN_PARENT_REPO -> test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths fails in CI
